reviews.comment:
La peor estación de YPF muy mala atención. Te dicen que no funciona el débito y que tenés que pagar en reales para después ellos vender los reales a los turistas que van a Brasil. Nadie para reclamar. Un desastre.

(Translated by Google)
The worst YPF station ever, terrible service. They tell you the debit card doesn't work and that you have to pay in reais so they can then sell the reais to tourists going to Brazil. No one to complain to. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzX3RTd3hnRRAB
